name: Skeleton
whenToUse: Showing placeholder shapes while content is loading.
avoidWhen: You know the progress percentage - use Progress.

examples.title: Shapes
examples.code:
<sg-stack gap="related">
    <sg-skeleton width="100%" height="20px" />
    <sg-skeleton width="200px" height="20px" />
    <sg-skeleton width="40px" height="40px" circle={true} />
</sg-stack>

examples.title: Card Placeholder
examples.code:
<sg-stack direction="horizontal" gap="related" align="center">
    <sg-skeleton width="48px" height="48px" circle={true} />
    <sg-stack gap="related">
        <sg-skeleton width="160px" height="16px" />
        <sg-skeleton width="100px" height="12px" />
    </sg-stack>
</sg-stack>
